title: The Loves of Carmen
writer: H.H. Caldwell, Katherine Hilliker, Prosper Mérimée
actors: Dolores del Rio, Don Alvarado, Victor McLaglen
plot: Prosper Merimee's story of a Spanish gypsy girl working in a cigar factory, and the rivalry for her affections among several men,including a soldier who helps her escape from jail and a famed bullfighter who at first finds her obn...
